This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-xmxx-7p24-h892. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.15 captures resolved bearer-auth configuration at startup, allowing revoked tokens to remain valid after SecretRef rotation. Gateway HTTP and WebSocket handlers fail to re-resolve authentication per-request, enabling attackers to use rotated-out bearer tokens for unauthorized gateway access.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m8wm-r5vq-qjpg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T16:14:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m8wm-r5vq-qjpg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m8wm-r5vq-qjpg"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T20:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:31:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-xmxx-7p24-h892", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43585", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/acd4e0a32f12e1ad85f3130f63b42443ce90f094", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-bearer-token-validation-bypass-via-stale-secretref-resolution", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m8wm-r5vq-qjpg"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Gateway HTTP endpoints re-resolve bearer auth after SecretRef rotation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T16:14:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m8wm-r5vq-qjpg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.15"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-11T16:14:20Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Gateway HTTP endpoints re-resolve bearer auth after SecretRef rotation
